---
title: "HMI interafce"
author: "granPiero"
date: "2024-10-12"
categories: [tech]
image: "todo.jpg"
execute: 
  echo: false
format: 
  html:
    comments:
      utterances: 
        repo: "fischerpj/ynot"
---

-   HMI is the latest Cloudflare Service Worker as a Proxy to Biblegateway.

-   Query is <https://hmi.pjafischer.workers.dev/bgw/cache/?param=gen1:1>

-   Response is JSON structure like, when cached with typical duration 4 ms

```{r}
myresponse <- '{"success":true,"error":null,"data":{"param":"gen1:1","searchQuery":"gen1:1","versionQuery":"SG21","cacheid":"v3.1","from_cache":true,"upstream":{"ok":true,"status":200}},"duration":3,"href":"https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=gen1%3A1&version=SG21","ref":"Genèse 1:1","version":"Segond 21","content":"1 Au commencement, Dieu créa le ciel et la terre."}'
jsonlite::prettify(myresponse)
```

-   response_object.content is the payload  along response_object.ref,  response_object.version abd response.duration [these four properties preserve previous interafaces]
